title: leea thorelii
intro: Leea thorelii, also known as the Thai lemongrass, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, native to Southeast Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its essential oil, which has been traditionally used to treat various health issues such as fever, digestive problems, and skin infections. The health benefits of Leea thorelii include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to alleviate symptoms of colds, flu, and other respiratory infections. Leea thorelii is commonly used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and essential oil blends, which can be used to promote relaxation, reduce stress, and improve overall well-being.
